home.heroSubtitle: MealMitra connects surplus food from restaurants, events, and households with local receivers in real-time. Together, we can end hunger and waste.

features.title: Why Choose
features.subtitle: Our platform is designed for speed, transparency, and impact.

proximity.title: Intelligent Proximity
proximity.desc: We only show food within a 20km radius to ensure freshness and reduce travel time.

notifications.title: Instant Notifications
notifications.desc: Recipients are notified the moment food is posted, minimizing wait times.

security.title: Verified Security
security.desc: Full tracking and identity verification for a safe, trusted community.
